impact: Some `.reviewbridge.json` config fields are accepted by the schema but not actually consumed downstream — silently no-op rather than rejected at load time. Surfaced during a pre-1.0.0 implementation review as a deferred medium issue. Specific fields not yet enumerated; an audit pass should grep config field references against actual usages and either wire them up or reject them in the loader. Not blocking 1.0.0 because no current user has reported a behavioral surprise; flagged so the audit can land in 1.0.x as a separate ticket.
title: Config no-op fields: schema accepts settings that nothing reads
